task: Claims-redactor: HIPAA Safe Harbor PHI redaction for healthcare claims and clinical narratives. Strips all 18 Safe Harbor identifiers plus NPI, DEA, and Medicaid IDs, replacing each with a stable [PHI_<CLASS>_<INDEX>] token so the original can be re-injected after a teacher-API round trip. Single source of truth: examples/claims-redactor/recipe.js mirrors the detector matrix in src/phi-redactor.js (W295/W258-ML-4 pattern). Evals run against examples/claims-redactor/seeds.jsonl (60 real claims notes covering all 20 PHI classes).

recipes.name: claims-redactor (HIPAA Safe Harbor + W343 bare names/addresses)

training_stats.approach: deterministic regex matrix mirrored 1:1 from src/phi-redactor.js DETECTORS (W295/W258-ML-4 single source of truth). W343 adds bare-name + bare-address detectors so unlabeled claims narratives still mask all three identifiers in the smoke-test note. Token format: [PHI_<CLASS>_<INDEX>]; same identifier in same input gets the same token so structure is preserved for downstream reinject().
